channel.title: Administration on Michael Healy's ePortfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Administration on Michael Healy's ePortfolio

item.title: Administrative Philosophy
item.description: In examining my administrative philosophy, I see four major threads emerging. First, that writing majors need to leverage and be adaptable to local contexts. Second, that they should be built on inquiry into the discipline of Rhetoric and Composition. Third, that they build on local expertise and needs. And fourth, that an effective writing major is built on praxis. This builds upon the idea that effective writing curriculum and pedagogy is responsive to and built out of local contexts, be responsive to local needs, and draw upon the interests and expertise of faculty, staff, and students within the university.
